answers.where: Snowy Frost Keep approach after Avalanche Reset; hero is back at stage 1 with Frost Shards visible.
answers.action: Recover Blocks for Gate, then use the Frost Blueprints panel to spend Shards on permanent upgrades.
answers.response: Frost Keep is now a compact rebuild objective at the top of the right rail, while Frost Blueprints is a separate spend panel below it.
answers.reward: The first Blueprint purchase spends Shards and raises Sharper Steel to Lv1, proving permanent progression without hiding the rebuild goal.
answers.game_look: The meta UI is separated into readable frosted panels with resource, objective, and upgrade hierarchy instead of one stacked debug column.

next: Continue with stronger animation/audio feedback and generated room art; do not add new meta systems before those gates pass.
